description: John Smith ordered a Business Laptop Pro and 2 Wireless Headphones, but one headphone arrived damaged. Process a partial refund for him in the Magento Admin (admin / Admin1234!). For the order associated with john.smith@example.com, create an offline Credit Memo to refund exactly 1 unit of 'Wireless Headphones' (SKU: HEADPHONES-001). The refund quantity for the laptop must be 0, and the shipping refund, adjustment refund, and adjustment fee must all be $0.00.
